name: tobe_sql_generation
objective: Generate one executable Oracle/MyBatis TO-BE SQL statement that preserves the source result set while following TO-BE schema mappings.
rules: Use TO_TABLE and TO_COL mappings as the primary source of truth.
Preserve query structure, filter intent, aggregation intent, join intent, MyBatis dynamic tags, and bind parameter names when possible.
Keep MyBatis placeholders exactly as valid MyBatis placeholders.

Keep existing MyBatis dynamic tags such as <if>, <choose>, <when>, <otherwise>, <where>, <trim>, and <foreach>; update only table names, column names, aliases, and SQL expressions needed by the mapping rules.
Do not split dynamic branches into separate SQL statements. Keep them inside the existing MyBatis dynamic tag structure.
Do not output commentary, markdown, JSON, multiple statements, PL/SQL, or statement-terminating semicolons.
Return exactly one Oracle/MyBatis SQL template.
user_instruction: Generate one Oracle/MyBatis SQL template only, preserving MyBatis dynamic tags unless a mapping rule requires a local SQL expression change.
